---
title: "Publications"
---

## Selected Peer-Reviewed Journals

::: {.publication-item}
[**Deep Learning for Global Shoreline Mapping: Challenges and Opportunities**]{.pub-title}  
[Pradhan, P., Smith, J., & Doe, L.]{.pub-authors}  
[*Nature Communications Earth & Environment*, 2025]  
[DOI: 10.1038/s43247-025-00123-x](https://doi.org)
:::

::: {.publication-item}
[**Urban Heat Inequality: A Spatial Analysis of 50 Global Cities**]{.pub-title}  
[Pradhan, P., & Zhang, Y.]{.pub-authors}  
[*Global Environmental Change*, 2024]  
[DOI: 10.1016/j.gloenvcha.2024.102834](https://doi.org)
:::

::: {.publication-item}
[**GeoFlow-Py: Scaling Hydrological Models with Dask**]{.pub-title}  
[Pradhan, P., & Wilson, K.]{.pub-authors}  
[*Journal of Open Source Software (JOSS)*, 2023]  
[DOI: 10.21105/joss.05202](https://doi.org)
:::

## Book Chapters

- Pradhan, P. (2023). "Remote Sensing in the Anthropocene." In *Modern Geography: A Review*. Springer.
